calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Amend Judgment To Add Nonparties As Judgment Debtors; Charge Judgment Debtors' Corporate Ownership Interests; Direct Corporations To Pay Judgment Creditor; Foreclose Judgment Debtors' Corporate Interests; And Restrain Judgment Debtors From Alienating Owneship Interests In Corporations
Off Calendar Aug-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. LEONARD EMMA OF THE LAW OFFICES OF RANDALL CRANE, TEL. NO. (510)465-4606 APPEARING FOR THE ASSIGNEE CA DEBT RECOVERY AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - ASSIGNEE CALIFORNIA DEBT RECOVERY'S Motion For Order To Amend Judgment To Add Nonparties As Judgment Debtors; Charge Judgment Debtors' Corporate Ownership Interests; Direct Corporations To Pay Judgment Creditor; Foreclose Judgment Debtors' Corporate Interests; And Restrain Judgment Debtors From Alienating Owneship Interests In Corporations IS GRANTED AS TO REQUEST TO ADD NON-PARTIES AS JUDGMENT DEBTORS. OTHER REQUESTS SHOULD BE BROUGHT IN THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189 =301/PJB

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

ASSIGNEE CALIFORNIA DEBT RECOVERY'S Motion To Amend Judgment IS OFF CALENDAR, MATTER SET IN DEPARMENT 301. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600

Assignee California Debt Recovery'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leonard Emma of the Law Office of Randall Crane, 510-465-4606, appearing for Assignee and moving party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Assignee California Debt Recovery's Motion to (1) Amend Judgment to add non parties as judgment debtors, (2) Charge judgment debtors' corporate ownership interests, (3) Direct corporations to pay judgment creditor, (4) Foreclose judgment debtors' corporate interests, and (5) Restrain judgment debtors from alienating ownership interests in corporations is denied. Proof of service is not valid. "I caused" does not show personal knowledge of service. Prevailing party may prepare a form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
